title: AML-BSA Compliance Gaps Brazil-US Corridor (FinCEN + SEC, 2014-2024)
description: Processed datasets from FinCEN SAR Statistics and SEC Investment Adviser Statistics supporting the analysis of BSA-LGPD regulatory compliance gaps for U.S. investment advisers with Brazilian client exposure. Companion to SSRN Working Paper (Marinho, 2026). ORCID: 0009-0004-6401-3465.

data.description: Investment Adviser SAR filings by year (FinCEN, 2014-2024)
Non-US RAUM managed by RIAs (SEC Form ADV, 2017-2023)
RIAs with Foreign Institution clients (SEC Form ADV, 2017-2023)
